info.title: MsgBuddy API
info.description: Multi-channel messaging platform API. Authentication uses short-lived access tokens (15 min) and refresh tokens (30 days). Use the access token in the Authorization header; use POST /auth/refresh with a refresh token to obtain new tokens, and POST /auth/logout or POST /auth/logout-all to revoke.

businessAbout.example: We help businesses automate customer conversations.
We help businesses automate customer conversations.
We help businesses automate customer conversations.

whatsappPhoneNumberId.description: WhatsApp Business API phone number ID

lastError.description: Most recent connection/subscription error if present

refreshToken.description: Refresh token from login or previous refresh

customFields.description: Field name → value; present when include=customFields

imported.description: Number of contacts successfully imported or updated

failed.description: Number of rows that failed validation or processing

nextCursor.description: Cursor for next page (base64). Omitted when no more pages.

primaryId.description: Contact ID to keep as primary

duplicateId.description: Contact ID to merge and soft-delete

isOptedOut.description: Opt the contact out of outbound messaging

description.example: Contacts with VIP tag and email

query.description: Filter criteria (tags, hasEmail, isBlocked, isOptedOut, customFields, lastMessageAfter, lastMessageBefore)

contactCount.description: Cached contact count from last preview

mediaId.description: FK to Media when the payload is media-backed

content.example: Customer requested callback tomorrow at 10 AM.

type.description: TEXT (default), IMAGE, VIDEO, AUDIO, DOCUMENT (WhatsApp media), or TEMPLATE. Other types are rejected.

text.description: Required when type is TEXT (or omitted). Optional caption for IMAGE, VIDEO, DOCUMENT (WhatsApp).

mediaId.description: Required for IMAGE/VIDEO/AUDIO/DOCUMENT when channel is WHATSAPP: Media id in this workspace (from resumable upload completion or POST /media/:id/prepare-whatsapp). Must not be set for TEXT.

templateId.description: Template id for template message send. Must be paired with templateVersionNum.

templateVersionNum.description: Template version for template message send. Must be paired with templateId.

templateVariables.description: Flat variables map used for template rendering/sending. Keys can be positional ("1","2") or named.

interactivePayload.description: Raw interactive payload for WhatsApp interactive messages (list/button/etc). Required when type is INTERACTIVE.

freeformAllowed.description: Whether free-form outbound messaging is currently allowed.

templateRequired.description: Whether a template message is required before free-form can be sent.

windowHours.description: WhatsApp customer-care window size in hours.

latestInboundAt.description: Timestamp of latest inbound message used for window decision.

windowClosesAt.description: When free-form send becomes allowed again if currently blocked.

whatsappMediaId.description: WhatsApp Graph media id for Cloud API send

name.description: Lowercase letters, numbers, underscores only. Max 512 characters.

carouselCards.description: Carousel cards when layoutType is CAROUSEL

archivedAt.description: Set when version is archived (soft delete). Versions are never hard-deleted.

providerStatus.description: Provider status: APPROVED, PENDING, REJECTED, PAUSED, DISABLED, IN_APPEAL, NOT_ON_PROVIDER.

lastFetchedAt.description: When this template was last seen during a provider import

qualityScore.description: Meta quality rating: GREEN, YELLOW, RED (from webhook or refresh-status)

lastQualityCheckAt.description: When status/quality was last updated from provider

versions.description: List returns latest version only; detail (GET by id) returns all versions.

imported.description: Number of templates created from provider

updated.description: Number of existing templates updated from provider

flagged.description: Number of local templates flagged as not on provider

name.description: Lowercase letters, numbers, underscores only. Max 512 characters.

headerContent.description: For TEXT header: plain text or variables (e.g. {{1}}, {{name}}). For IMAGE/VIDEO/DOCUMENT: use asset handle from POST /media/upload-for-template.

body.description: Required. Max 1024 characters (WhatsApp limit with other components).

language.description: Language code for Meta Cloud API

ttlSeconds.description: Time-to-live for undelivered messages in seconds (Meta: 60–600)

buttons.description: Button definitions. URL buttons may contain exactly one placeholder for dynamic URL (e.g. https://example.com/{{1}} or {{tracking_id}}). Zero or two+ placeholders in a URL are invalid.

carouselCards.description: Carousel cards (required when layoutType is CAROUSEL). Each card: headerFormat (IMAGE|VIDEO), headerHandle, body, buttons.

headerContent.description: For TEXT header: plain text or variables (e.g. {{1}}, {{name}}). For media: asset handle from POST /media/upload-for-template.

body.description: Max 1024 characters (WhatsApp limit with other components).

language.description: Language code for Meta Cloud API

ttlSeconds.description: Time-to-live for undelivered messages in seconds (Meta: 60–600)

buttons.description: Button definitions. URL buttons may contain exactly one placeholder for dynamic URL (e.g. https://example.com/{{1}}).

reason.example: Button format not compliant with policy

targetId.description: ID of contact, conversation, or campaign

id.description: Unique identifier for the connected client business

name.description: Name of the connected client business

business_status.description: Current status of the connected client business

created_time.description: When the business connection was created (ISO 8601)

updated_time.description: When the business connection was last updated (ISO 8601)

workspaceId.description: Workspace ID to assign. Omit or pass null to unassign account from a workspace.

isClientShared.description: Indicates whether WABA is shared by a client business

permissions.description: Meta permissions/tasks available for this WABA

code.description: Authorization code returned by Meta login

waba_id.description: WABA ID returned by WhatsApp Embedded Signup FINISH event

business_id.description: Business ID returned by WhatsApp Embedded Signup FINISH event

phone_number_id.description: Optional selected phone number ID from Embedded Signup FINISH payload

lastError.description: Most recent connection/subscription error if present

onboardingPhase.description: Onboarding phase; after exchange-code, call POST /whatsapp/register-number with a 6-digit PIN if Meta still shows the number as pending registration

metaPhoneStatus.description: Cached Meta phone `status` from last Graph sync

metaVerificationStatus.description: Cached Meta `code_verification_status` from last Graph sync

registrationPending.description: True when Meta reports the number still needs Cloud API registration (PIN). Frontend should prompt for PIN and POST /whatsapp/register-number

pin.description: Six-digit two-step verification PIN for Cloud API registration

code.description: Verification code from SMS or voice

phone_number_id.description: Meta WhatsApp phone number ID for the Cloud API account

metaVerificationStatus.description: Cached Meta code_verification_status from last sync

metaPhoneStatus.description: Cached Meta phone status from last sync

registrationPending.description: True when Meta still requires Cloud API registration (PIN) for this number

file_type.description: MIME types supported by WhatsApp Cloud API media (see Meta media reference).

assetHandle.description: Graph resumable asset handle; omitted when MIME types use WhatsApp media upload only (no Graph session).

mediaId.description: Persisted Media id — use as `mediaId` on POST /messages with the matching media type.
